mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent monthly inflation above 295 in CPIAUCSL signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 295 despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicates strong economic activity, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through earnings momentum.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 for any 3-year window when INDPRO and CPIAUCSL both rise.

mechanism_narrative: A labor market tightness regime (UNRATE < 3.5%) combined with strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) signals corporate hiring strength, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 40% of instances where UNRATE < 3.5% and PAYEMS > 150000.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST > 1500k) indicate improved consumer confidence and construction activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where HOUST exceeds 1500k.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in retail sales (RSAFS > 680k) reflects strong consumer spending, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through sectoral demand drivers.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 40% of instances where RSAFS exceeds 680000.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP (GDPC1 < 19700) paired with low Fed funds rates (FEDFUNDS < 1.5%) signals recession risks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below -0.05 for any 3-year window when GDPC1 < 19700 and FEDFUNDS < 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent industrial production growth (INDPRO > 104.3) during a supply-side expansion phase indicates robust corporate capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 104.3.
